titleStmt.title: SII 38.570: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 570.

p.hi: King: Achyutarāya Year Śaka 1456, Jaya, Vaiśākha, ba. di. 15, Mīna-saṅkramaṇa = 28th April Thursday 1534 A.D.

summary.p: The first portion is in Sanskrit and it refers to a certain Vīra-Bhūpala, younger brother of Vīrapaṇṇa and son of Muddāmbika and Nandi-Lakēndra. It is said that it was he who made the grant. The second potion records that all the sēṭṭipaṭṭaṇasvāmis including Ayyōvoḷe of ubhaya-nānādēśa made a grant of revenue yielding from certain taxes levied on weekly Sunday fairs at Vīrēśvarapura in the village Lēpākshi of Roda-nāḍ in Penngoṇḍa rājya. The gift was meant for the services like incense, lamp, amṛitapaḍi, dance, music-both vocal and instrumental -to the gods Pāpavināśa-dēva, Vīrēśvara and Raghunātha of Lēpākshi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Each line begins with ‘O’śubhamastu . lēpākṣi vīrabhadrasya . pāpānāśēśvarasyaca . viṣṇōśrīraghunāthasya naivēdyādi samṛddayē .
śrīrmamaddāṁbikānaṁdilakēṁdravarasūnunā . virapaṁṇānujēna śrī vīrabhūpālamauḷi
nā . bhaktyāvijñāpitairnānādēśikairvyāvahārikēḥ . lēpākṣipura vargērsmi . pratibhāskaravā
saraṁ . sārdhē śulkasuvarnādiḥ . sarvādāyaḥ samarpitaḥ . likhyatē lōkavikhyātyai . śāsanērsmi
śilāmayē . svastiśrī jayabhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1456 neya ja
ya saṁvatsarada vaiśākha śu 15 pu(ṁ)ṇyakāladalū . śrīman mahārājādhirāja rāmaparamēśvara
śrī vīrapratāpa śrīAcutadēva mahārāyaru pṛthvīrājyaṁgaivuttaṁ yiralu lēpākṣi pāpavināśa dēvarigū virē
śvara dēvarigū raghunātha dēvarigū dūpadīpa Amrutapaḍi naivēdya nrutyagītavādya muṁttāda vaibhavaṁgaḷige
penugoṁḍeya vīrapaṁṇayanavara taṁmaṁdiru vīraṇanāyakaru . svasti samasta nija nāmāṁka mā
nikā praśasti sahitarāda śrīmadaṇēśvara gaurīśvara dēvara divya śrīpādapadmārādhakarāda vubhaya nānā
dēśa Ayyāvaḷe mukhyavāda samastaseṭi paṭaṇasvāmigaḷa kayyalu . penugoṁḍerājya rodanā
ḍa lēpākṣi grāmadoḷagaṇa vīrēśvaradēvarapuradalli Ādityavāra saṁtheyalu huṭṭuva . vāṭara
mageme harahenāḍa suṁka hosūranāḍa suṁka staḷada nelavaḷi suṁka Ivu muṁtā
da suṁkavanū pasurādāya modalāda sarvādāyavanū I dēvarugaḷige I seṭi paṭaṇasvāmiga
ḷa kaiyyalu sarvasaṁmatavāgi Idake Ārobaru tapidarū dēvadrōhigaḷū yeṁdu śapathapu
ra(ḥ)ssaravāgi ĀcaṁdrārkasthāyiĀgi dhāreyanerasi koḍisida lēpākṣipurada saṁtheya suṁkhada dha
rmaśāsana .
Digital edition of SII 38.570 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
